title: Connected-Boards, feature to toggle from main-table to other board views

posts.author: Cyrino (JP Nonnet)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would it be possible to have a connected-board column feature that allows you to toggle/ select items from a view other then the default main table.

My use case is pretty simple I have a URL index board with two separate grouped views one for ACTIVE URLs and one group view for ARCHIVED/INACTIVE URLs. I connect the URL index board to my campaign board using the connected board column enabling marketing teams to select URLS to add to campaigns.

However, from the campaign board when I hit the little blue + symbol on the connected column it only pulls data from the default main table view and does not give me the option to toggle to my ACTIVE URLs view or ARCHIVED URLs view to pull specific data pertaining to that group.

Is this something that has come up before with other Monday users and would Monday consider putting this into their roadmap if it is not already there. I would be happy to include a video recording for more clarity on feature request.
